calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Advanced From Dec-31-14 To Dec-26-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Dec-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: RESPONDENT DONALD PIPKINS, Tel No. (415) 821-6339 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights by Donald Pipkins is GRANTED. The Court finds that the transfer of structured settlement payment rights satisfies the provisions of Calif. Ins. Code 10139.5. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Paula J. Shi, CSR #13358 (302/EHG)
